commit_scope: Make the non-host current-branch landing decision native by moving PR readiness classification into the cached fkwu form-cli dispatch.

commands: bash form/validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/current-branch-landing.fk form-stdlib/tests/current-branch-landing-band.fk -> 16383; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way
bash form/validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk ... form-stdlib/current-branch-landing.fk form-stdlib/form-cli.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-cli-band.fk -> 65535; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way

bash scripts/ensure_form_cli_native.sh && printf 'land-readiness OPEN 0 none CLEAN 3 0 0 0 0
land-readiness OPEN 0 none CLEAN 3 1 0 0 1
land-readiness OPEN 0 none BEHIND 3 1 0 0 1
quit
' | form/form-cli -> ready; waiting; needs_rebase
gh pr view 3687 raw fields piped into native form/form-cli land-readiness -> native_status=blocked for merged PR
bin/form-cli land --dry-run --merge --settle-deploy -> proves Form plan and prints non-mutating landing path
bash scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh -> PASS on mac cross-check; fnri witness 32767

make wellness -> pass; deploy aligned at origin/main
results: form-cli.fk now exposes land-readiness, backed by current-branch-landing.fk, including the post-push refreshing flag.
scripts/land_current_branch.sh no longer classifies ready/waiting/blocked/needs-rebase in bash; it asks native form-cli for status and only formats the reason around explicit host fields.
The shell observes whether a failed check appears inside the bounded post-push refresh window; Form classifies that state as waiting and keeps dirty/behind branches as needs_rebase.
The cached darwin-arm64 form-cli binary and bootstrap stamps were regenerated so runtime form-cli serves the new native verb without Go/clang.
Windows-floor expectation path updated from form-cli-band 32767 to 65535 after adding post-push refresh coverage.
GitHub field extraction, GitHub API merge/delete, git push/rebase, deploy polling, and existing Python validation gates remain explicit host-effect or retiring-bridge carriers.

deploy_validation.reason: Native CLI bootstrap artifacts and docs changed; public deploy validation pending merge/deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The current-branch lander now delegates PR readiness classification to native form-cli land-readiness while retaining explicit host effects for git, GitHub, and deploy.
test_flows: native form-cli land-readiness returns ready for open clean green checks
native form-cli land-readiness returns waiting for a just-pushed stale failed-check rollup
native form-cli land-readiness returns blocked for an already merged PR
form-cli land dry-run proves current-branch-landing.fk before host-effect plan
